opener: The arena is quiet today, the air heavy with expectation.
closer: A professional display by the arena's finest.

opener: The crowd is roaring, their shouts echoing against the stone walls!
closer: The sand is stained deep red, and the crowd loves it.

opener: They want blood, and the arena delivers!
closer: No mercy was found today in the circle of truth.

opener: A drama unfolds on the sands today!
closer: A performance for the ages, etched in the memories of all who watched.

glancing: %A's %W hits the %BP, but the angle is poor and the blade slides off.
%A slashes with his %W, but the strike is a glancing blow only.
solid: %A unleashes a blinding flurry of cuts with his %W, biting into the %BP!
%A steps deep inside the guard, whipping his %W into a vicious arc across the %BP!
%A's %W lunges with awesome cutting power, rending the %BP!
mastery: In a blur of practiced rhythm, %A's %W flows through %D's guard to find the %BP.
%A's %W seems to vanish and reappear, bitingly deep into the %BP with effortless grace.
The %W moves like an extension of %A's own soul, carving a perfect line across the %BP.
critical_human: A horrifying display of speed as %A carves a deep path through %D's %BP with his %W!
%A's %W flashes as he takes a sudden vicious slash, nearly severing the %BP!
%A feints low, catching %D off guard before ripping his %W across the %BP in a spray of crimson!
critical_supernatural: The air shudders as %A's %W hums with a spectral light, cleaving through %D's %BP and the very air itself.
%A's eyes glow with an inner fire as their %W leaves a trail of silver light, shredding the %BP in a mythic display.
Aetheric pressure precedes the blow; %A's %W strikes with the weight of stars, obliterating the %BP.
fatal: %A feints low, catching %D off guard before severing their %BP at the joint.
A fountain of gore erupts as %A's final strike decapitates %D!
%A steps past a fading guard and ends %D's life with a chilling, masterful execution!

glancing: %A's %W bounces off the %BP with a hollow clang.
%A heaves his %W, but the weight carries it wide, only grazing the %BP.
solid: %A roars, bringing the %W down like an executioner's maul on the %BP!
%A steps into the strike, letting the massive weight of the %W hammer the %BP!
mastery: %A catches %D in a perfect orbit of weight, hammering the %BP with crushing precision.
The %W strikes with a focused vibration, %A's mastery turning raw weight into surgical impact on the %BP.
With terrifying economy of motion, %A drops the %W directly onto the %BP.
critical_human: The arena trembles as %A unleashes a terrifying overhead smash, crushing the %BP!
%A winds up and unleashes a thunderous swing, the %W shattering %D's %BP!
critical_supernatural: Gravity itself seems to bow to %A's %W, as the impact on the %BP creates a localized shockwave of force.
A boom like thunder echoes as %A's %W connects, the strike wreathed in a faint, destructive static.
%A strikes with the force of a collapsing mountain, the %W glowing with a dull, menacing heat.
fatal: %A shows no mercy, delivering a horrifying, skull-crushing execution!
The match concludes in horrific fashion as %D's %BP is pulverized by %A's %W!

glancing: %A's %W skips off the %BP, barely scratching the surface.
%A thrusts with his %W, but the point catches only air and armor.
solid: %A drops his center and drives a blinding lunge with his %W into the %BP!
%A's %W strikes like a coiled viper, piercing the %BP!
mastery: %A's %W finds the microscopic gap in %D's defense, sliding effortlessly into the %BP.
With a dancer's poise, %A threads the needle, burying the %W deep into the %BP.
The %W moves in a straight, undeniable line, %A's focus total as it punctures the %BP.
critical_human: %A extends fully, every ounce of reach behind his %W as it sinks deep into the %BP!
%A launches a controlled, perfectly balanced lunge, the %W finding a gap in the %BP!
critical_supernatural: Percentage of the void follows the tip of %A's %W as it pierces the %BP with impossible geometry.
The %W hums a low, deathly note, its point glowing with a cold light as it bypasses reality to hit the %BP.
%A's thrust is a streak of pure energy, the %W leaving a hollowed-out path through the %BP.
fatal: %A drops into a low crouch and rockets his %W upward, ending %D's life in a spray of crimson!
%A executes %D with a chilling, masterful strike of the %W through the %BP!

glancing: %A throws a PUNCH, but it merely grazes %D's %BP.
solid: %A steps inside the guard and unleashes a horrific combination on the %BP!
mastery: %A's limbs are a blur of technical perfection, striking the %BP with rhythmic violence.
Every joint in %A's body snaps in sequence, delivering a masterwork of force to the %BP.
critical_human: %A throws a rock-fisted PUNCH of incredible felling power into the %BP!
critical_supernatural: %A's fist glows with an internal aura, the impact on the %BP shattering the air in a localized burst.
A golden light follows %A's strike, the sound of a bell ringing as the %BP is struck by 'The Enlightened Hand'.
fatal: %A grabs his opponent and drives a sickening KNEE into their midsection. %D collapses dead.

success: %D twists his body with surprising grace, allowing the attack to pass harmlessly by.
%D rolls beneath the blow, rising instantly with his weapon ready.
stumbling: %D barely avoids the blow, stumbling awkwardly into the sand.

success: %D catches the strike on the edge of his weapon, turning it aside with ease.
A sharp ring of steel as %D parries the blow with practiced ease.
stumbling: %D barely manages to bring his guard up in time, the impact nearly rattling his weapon free.

whiff: %A's %W whistles through empty air as %D slips the blow.
A desperate swing by %A finds only dust and shadows.
initiative: %A takes the center of the sands, %W held in a low, menacing guard.
With a sudden burst of speed, %A seizes the opening!
The arena goes silent as %A dictates the pace of the exchange.

AimedBlow: %A studies the opponent's rhythm, waiting for the perfect opening.
BashingAttack: %A hammers through the defensive stance — raw power overwhelms technique!

KO: %D collapses into the dust, consciousness fleeing as %A's %W delivers the final blow. KNOCKED OUT!
Kill: finds the fatal gap in the helm with surgical precision — a KILLING BLOW to the skull!
places the blade with lethal accuracy — a precise KILLING STRIKE!

ST: You notice a primal strength in %A's posture.

pitch: The crowd is hungry for real suffering, %S. This match promises to paint the sands red.
There's a certain... finality... in the air for this one. Don't disappoint the blood-gods.
The spotlight is yours, %S! Give 'em a show they'll be talking about for years.
A clash of stars! Everyone who's anyone is coming to see if your legacy is real.

Kill: In a {{adj}} display of combat, {{winner}} ({{styleW}}) struck down {{loser}} with a killing blow. The {{styleL}} fighter will be missed — but not mourned for long in this arena.
{{winner}} delivered a {{adj}} execution of {{loser}}! The crowd gasped as the finishing strike landed. Another warrior returns to the dust.
Death claimed {{loser}} at the hands of {{winner}}. A {{adj}} end to what was a hard-fought bout.
KO: {{winner}} battered {{loser}} into unconsciousness with {{adj}} efficiency. The {{styleW}}'s power was on full display.
A {{adj}} knockout! {{winner}} overwhelmed {{loser}}'s defenses and left them crumpled on the sand.
Stoppage: {{winner}} ground {{loser}} down in a {{adj}} bout of attrition. The Arenamaster called the stoppage to merciful applause.

victory: Both fighters pushed to total exhaustion in a {{adj}} endurance contest. {{winner}} was awarded the bout by the narrowest of margins.
draw: A {{adj}} bout ended in mutual exhaustion — neither warrior could claim victory.

Draw: The bout between {{a}} and {{d}} ended in a {{adj}} draw. Neither fighter could gain the decisive advantage.

headlines.HotStreak: Week {{week}}: {{name}} Is On Fire — {{streak}} Consecutive Victories!
headlines.Streak: Week {{week}}: {{name}} Rides a {{streak}}-Win Streak Into Glory!
headlines.Rivalry: Week {{week}}: Old Foes Meet Again — {{a}} vs {{b}} (Bout {{count}})
headlines.RisingStar: Week {{week}}: RISING STAR! {{name}} Opens Career with a Perfect 3-0!
headlines.MultipleKills: Week {{week}}: Blood Runs Deep — {{count}} Warriors Fall!
headlines.Kill: Week {{week}}: {{killer}} Claims a Life in the Arena
headlines.Standard: Week {{week}}: A {{adj}} Week in the Coliseum

featured.LegendaryStreak: The arena trembles before {{name}}, who has now won an astonishing {{streak}} bouts in a row! Legends speak of such dominance only in whispers.
featured.HotStreak: {{name}} continues an incredible run of form with {{streak}} consecutive victories. Can anyone stop this warrior?
featured.Streak: {{name}} is building momentum with {{streak}} wins in a row — a warrior to watch closely.
featured.LegacyRivalry: The bitter feud between {{a}} and {{b}} continues to captivate the arena! This marks their {{count}}th meeting — a rivalry for the ages.
featured.Rivalry: {{a}} and {{b}} crossed blades for the {{count}}{{suffix}} time. The crowd senses a budding rivalry.
featured.RisingStar: All eyes turn to {{name}}, who has burst onto the scene with three consecutive victories to open their career. A rising star — or a flash in the pan? Only the arena will tell.
featured.Upset: In a stunning upset, {{winner}} (fame: {{fameW}}) defeated the celebrated {{loser}} (fame: {{fameL}})! The crowd roared in disbelief as the underdog proved that fame means nothing once steel is drawn.
featured.Graveyard: The Hall of Warriors receives {{count}} new name{{plural}} this week. Their sacrifice is not forgotten.

season_summary.headline: {{season}} Season in Review: {{total}} Bouts, {{kills}} Deaths
body: The {{season}} season concludes with {{total}} bouts fought and a {{killRate}}% fatality rate.
It was a particularly deadly season — many promising careers cut short.
The arena turns its gaze to the next season. What legends will emerge?

headline: BLOOD ON THE SANDS: THE RISE OF %S
ARENA FEVER: %S CLIMBS THE RANKINGS

high.text: Summons a storm of steel that leaves no room to breathe
A terrifying maestro of battle tempo, dictating every bloody exchange
Bends the chaos of the pit to his will, forcing foes to fight on his terms
Drowns his opponent in a relentless tide of crushing aggression
Forces a suffocating, lethal rhythm onto the blood-soaked sands
Steals the center of the pit and refuses to yield a single step
Has learned how to keep his foe in trouble

low.text: Lunges from the shadows before the opponent is ready
Fights with a hungry, restless aggression
With a very aggressive and clever fighting style
Has learned how to be decisive and quick

high.text: Baits their opponent into a fatal trap of their own making
Turns the opponent's strength into their execution
Makes the most of his enemy's mistakes
Makes good dueling decisions

low.text: Twists an enemy's assault into a sudden, bloody end
Does a lot of little things well
Cleverly controls his foe's actions

high.text: Obliterates opponents with god-like, merciless precision
Hunts for the vital organs with terrifying precision
Makes very clever attacks
He lands blows on less protected areas

low.text: Transforms every meager opening into a harrowing bloodbath
Has an unusual fighting style that confuses many opponents
Makes clever attacks

high.text: An impenetrable wall of iron, turning aside the deadliest steel
Parrys very intelligently
Is gifted at parrying

low.text: Denies the killing stroke with grim, practiced resolve
Rarely makes mistakes
Parrys intelligently

high.text: Displays a chilling level of situational dominance
Is always thinking ahead
Is gifted at avoiding a blow

low.text: Weaves through the carnage with grim efficiency
Avoids blows well
Makes few mistakes

high.text: A tireless engine of destruction, grinding foes to bloody paste
Rarely wastes his endurance needlessly
Can conserve his endurance past what might normally be expected

low.text: Refuses to empty his lungs until the slaughter is completely finished
He plans out every move he makes, seldom wasting any effort
Seldom wastes his endurance needlessly

high.text: Surrenders the momentum to the butcher immediately, standing completely helpless
He needs time to think things through before he can act

low.text: Moves with the urgency of a stone sinking in mud
He stands around slack-jawed

high.text: Telegraphs every swing so heavily it practically invites his own death
He makes a lot of mistakes

low.text: Telegraphs every swing like a lumbering ox
He makes stupid feints that fool no one

coordination.Marvel of Fighting Coordination: Is a marvel of fighting coordination

origin: Found fighting for scraps in the pit districts.
Orphaned at twelve, trained in the yards.
Escaped the mines with nothing but fury.
A street brawler with untapped potential.
Sold to the arena by a desperate family.
Survived the border wars. Now fights for coin.

Lunging Attack: A blur of speed and steel.
Parry Lunge: Waits, then strikes like a viper.
Slashing Attack: Arcs of steel fill the air.
Wide, sweeping cuts that never stop.
Wall of Steel: A whirling wall of defense and attack.

epigraph: The sands have claimed what the steel could not. Rest in the dust.
A life of violence ends in a moment of silence.

victory: To the victor, the spoils! %A stands tall as the champion of the circle.
Let the wine flow for %A tonight, for tomorrow the sands demand more.

flair.Flashy: Crowd favorite — earns +2 Popularity per flashy fight. Theatrical crowd moods amplify this further.
flair.Comeback: Survived near-death to win — earns +1 Fame and +1 Popularity when triggered.
flair.RiposteChain: Master counter-fighter — earned by landing 3+ ripostes in a single bout. +1 Fame.
flair.Dominance: Overwhelming victor — earned by landing 5+ hits in a winning bout. +1 Fame.
flair.Giant Killer: Slayer of legends — earned by winning 3+ upset victories against far more famous opponents.

title.Tournament Champion: Won a seasonal tournament. A mark of elite combat prowess.
title.Champion: Reigning arena champion — commands respect and higher Fame gains.

injury.Broken Arm: Reduces Attack and Parry effectiveness until healed.
injury.Cracked Ribs: Lowers Endurance and increases vulnerability to body shots.
injury.Concussion: Reduces Initiative and Wit-based skills temporarily.
injury.Torn Muscle: Strength penalty — lower damage output until recovered.
injury.Sprained Ankle: Speed and Defense are penalized until healed.
injury.Deep Laceration: Ongoing HP loss risk in future bouts until healed.
injury.Fractured Skull: Severe — major penalties to all skills. May end a career.
injury.Dislocated Shoulder: Reduces Attack and weapon handling until healed.

status.Active: Ready for combat — can be assigned to bouts and tournaments.
status.Dead: Fallen in the arena. Their legacy lives on in the Graveyard.
status.Retired: Honorably withdrawn from combat. May become a trainer.
